title: The Executioner of Venice
writer: Luigi Capuano, Arpad DeRiso, Ottavio Poggi
actors: Lex Barker, Guy Madison, Alessandra Panaro
plot: In Venice,during the Inquisition,Sandrigo Bembo,the son of the Doge Giovanni Bembo,is falsely accused of treason out of pure malice by the Grand Inquisitor Rodrigo Zeno.
